# The Leading Quantum Technologies Conference.
Q2B is where the future of quantum technology comes to life. Join leaders and innovators pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.  

[ Q2B25 Silicon Valley Registration Q2B25 Silicon Valley Registration ](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/q2b25-silicon-valley-tickets-1559397733599?aff=oddtdtcreator&utm-source=cp&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing)[ Book your hotel in Silicon Valley Book your hotel in Silicon Valley ](https://www.hyatt.com/en-US/group-booking/CLARA/G-Q2CW)
[June 4-5, 2026 Q2B Tokyo](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-tokyo)[September 9-10, 2026 Q2B Copenhagen](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-copenhagen)[December 8-9-10 2026 Q2B Chicago](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-chicago)
SCROLL TO EXPLORE
## Our conferences
[ June 4-5, 2026 Registration open Tokyo At the Tokyo Grand Hyatt ](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-tokyo)[ Sept. 9-10, 2026 Copenhagen At the Øksnehallen ](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-copenhagen)[ Dec. 8-10, 2026 Chicago At the Marriott Marquis Chicago ](https://q2b.qcware.com/conference/2026-chicago)
[](https://quantum2025.org/)
Q2B is the global stage for quantum innovation, bringing together visionaries, researchers, and industry leaders to drive breakthroughs and shape the future of technology.

Q2B connects you with the brightest minds in quantum technology, offering insights and solutions to drive impact in the quantum revolution.

Researchers
Industry Professionals
Startups
Educators
